testcase.name: whenUnauthenticated_thenPublicPagesAreAccessible

testcase.name: whenAuthenticated_thenPublicPagesAreAccessible

testcase.name: whenUnauthenticated_thenStaticAssetsAreAccessible
testcase.system-out: 2025-06-09T03:02:38.566Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Securing GET /css/styles.css 2025-06-09T03:02:38.566Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.s.s.w.a.AnonymousAuthenticationFilter : Set SecurityContextHolder to anonymous SecurityContext 2025-06-09T03:02:38.567Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Secured GET /css/styles.css [ApiKeyAuthenticationFilter] shouldNotFilter path: /css/styles.css 2025-06-09T03:02:38.567Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.c.security.JwtAuthenticationFilter : Processing request to: /css/styles.css 2025-06-09T03:02:38.567Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.c.security.JwtAuthenticationFilter : No Bearer token found in request 2025-06-09T03:02:38.570Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Securing GET /js/cursor-heat.js 2025-06-09T03:02:38.570Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.s.s.w.a.AnonymousAuthenticationFilter : Set SecurityContextHolder to anonymous SecurityContext 2025-06-09T03:02:38.570Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Secured GET /js/cursor-heat.js [ApiKeyAuthenticationFilter] shouldNotFilter path: /js/cursor-heat.js 2025-06-09T03:02:38.571Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.c.security.JwtAuthenticationFilter : Processing request to: /js/cursor-heat.js 2025-06-09T03:02:38.571Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.c.security.JwtAuthenticationFilter : No Bearer token found in request

testcase.name: whenUnauthenticated_thenMemberPagesRedirectToLogin
testcase.system-out: 2025-06-09T03:02:38.581Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Securing GET /dashboard.html 2025-06-09T03:02:38.581Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.s.s.w.a.AnonymousAuthenticationFilter : Set SecurityContextHolder to anonymous SecurityContext 2025-06-09T03:02:38.581Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.s.s.w.s.HttpSessionRequestCache : Saved request http://localhost/dashboard.html?continue to session 2025-06-09T03:02:38.582Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.s.s.web.DefaultRedirectStrategy : Redirecting to http://localhost/login.html 2025-06-09T03:02:38.586Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Securing GET /account.html 2025-06-09T03:02:38.586Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.s.s.w.a.AnonymousAuthenticationFilter : session 2025-06-09T03:02:38.586Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.s.s.web.DefaultRedirectStrategy : Redirecting to http://localhost/login.html 2025-06-09T03:02:38.587Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Securing GET /billing.html 2025-06-09T03:02:38.587Z DEBUG 7988 --- [ main] o.s.s.w.a.AnonymousAuthenticationFilter : Set SecurityContextHolder to anonymous
